info.title: Madar API
info.description: Madar POS — multi-tenant cafe and restaurant management. The Rust backend is the source of truth for this spec; the Flutter teller app and React management dashboard consume the generated openapi.json.

parameters.name: branch_id
parameters.description:
When set, prices are branch-effective (override replaces default_price) and
addons disabled at this branch are excluded — the per-branch addon list the
POS consumes. Omitted → the plain org list (legacy behaviour).

get.summary:
Server-Sent Events stream of delivery-order changes for one branch. Auth is
the same Bearer + `delivery_orders:read` + branch-access trio as the list
endpoint, enforced before the stream opens. The stream is **updates-only**:
the client should `GET /delivery-orders` first to seed the list, then connect.
On any error/disconnect the client re-GETs and reconnects.

200.description: DEPRECATED delivery-only view of the unified bus — prefer GET /realtime/stream?topics=delivery. Each event is `event: delivery.created|delivery.updated` + a `data:` DeliveryOrder JSON line. `: ping` every ~20s. On ANY error/close, re-GET /delivery-orders and reconnect.

un-voided line — for the given station if provided), oldest first. Seed for

(Items are returned in full; the client greys/filters by station.)

mode.description:
"auto" | "open" | "closed". Named `mode` (not `override`) because a bare
`override` field is a reserved word in Dart and breaks the POS client
code generator.

AddonCost.description: Computed cost for one addon item.

cost.description:
Ingredient cost rollup in piastres over the ingredients that *are*
priced. A partial rollup still returns the sum so far, with
`cost_missing = true`; `null` only when nothing is priced.

cost_missing.description:
`true` when at least one ingredient is unlinked or has no cost, so `cost`
(if any) is partial rather than the full figure.

margin_pct.description: `(price - cost) / price` — only when the cost is *complete* and price > 0.

unit_price.description:
Charged unit price (piastres) the POS applied for this addon. When present
it is RECORDED as the addon's unit_price; absent → the server's expected
(catalog) price is used. Bundle-component addons ignore this (server-priced).

AnalysisConfig.description:
`#[serde(default)]` lets clients send partial configs; missing fields
take the values below. Output serialization is unaffected.

revenue_mode_max_raise_pct.description:
Conservative max-raise cap for revenue-only items (no margin floor to
guard against).

code.description:
Short org-unique branch prefix (A-Z0-9) embedded in every order_ref
(`<CODE>-YYMMDD-…`). Exposed so an offline device can mint the same ref the
server would, from first boot, without waiting for a synced order.

geo_radius_meters.description: Radius in meters within which this branch is considered a match. Defaults to 200.

latitude.description: WGS-84 latitude for geofenced branch resolution.

longitude.description: WGS-84 longitude for geofenced branch resolution.

org_logo_url.description: Convenience field — populated from the parent org's `logo_url`.

is_available.description: False disables the addon at this branch (excluded from the branch addon list).

price_override.description: Branch price in piastres; null inherits the org default_price.
Branch price in piastres; null inherits the org default_price.

in_mall_discount_id.description:
Optional discount applied to each channel's item subtotal (reuses the
org `discounts` table). Frozen onto the order at intake. `null` = none.

in_mall_require_location.description:
When false, in-mall orders may be placed without a device GPS location
("confirm you're at the branch"). Shop/company + floor + unit are always
required regardless. Default true.

otp_required.description:
When false, the public checkout skips OTP phone verification for this
branch and accepts orders without a device token. Default true.

cost_per_unit.description: Piastres per unit; `null` ⟺ cost never entered.

last_counted_at.description:
When this item was last reconciled by a finalized stock count; `null` =
never counted. Drives the "count due" signal on the inventory home.

par_max.description: Order-up-to level (bring stock back up to this when reordering).

par_min.description: Reorder point (order when on-hand ≤ this). Falls back to reorder_threshold.

branch_name.description:
Branch name; only populated by the all-branches waste roll-up (nil
{branch_id}). `None` for single-branch queries that do not select it.

movement_type.description:
inventory_movement_type: sale | void_restock | adjustment_add |
adjustment_remove | waste | transfer_out | transfer_in | purchase_in | stock_count

quantity.description: Signed delta applied to stock (consumption negative, replenishment positive).

unit_cost.description: Piastres per unit at movement time; `null` ⟺ unknown.

is_available.description: False disables the item at this branch (excluded from the branch menu).

price_override.description: Branch price in piastres; null inherits the org catalog base_price.

sizes.description: Per-size branch prices for this item (empty when none). Availability is item-level.

price_override.description: Branch price in piastres; null inherits the org catalog base_price.

sizes.description:
Per-size branch prices. `null`/omitted → leave existing size overrides untouched;
a list → REPLACE the item's size overrides with exactly that set (empty clears them).

in_mall_discount_id.description:
Optional per-channel discount ids (must be active discounts in the
caller's org). `null` clears the channel's discount.

in_mall_require_location.description:
When false, in-mall orders are accepted without a device GPS location.
Defaults to true so an omitting client keeps the location check on.

otp_required.description:
When false, the public checkout skips OTP for this branch. Defaults to
true so an omitting client keeps verification on.

price_override.description: Branch price for this size in piastres.

oneOf.description: `None` when any component is cost-missing — CM math is impossible.

confidence_ab.description: Directional: P(item_b in basket | item_a in basket), item_a = focus.

bundle_cost.description: All cost-derived fields are `None` when any component lacks cost data.

missing_costs.description: True ⟺ at least one component is cost-missing.

cm_in_range_pct.description:
Fraction of accepted CM suggestions whose realized price landed
within ±2% of the suggested price. `None` below 10 samples.

restore_inventory.description:
true (default): ingredients stay available. false: the food was made and is
wasted — the frozen plan is deducted from stock and logged as `waste`.

CartLineInput.description:
One line of a public cart. Prices are NOT taken from the client — the server
resolves them. `addons` reuses [`AddonInput`] but its `unit_price` is ignored.

client_ref.description:
Client-minted idempotency / reconciliation key, echoed back so an
offline client can map its queued movement to the server row. NULL for
live online movements.

Client-minted idempotency / reconciliation key. The POS sends a stable
UUID per movement so a replayed offline movement dedupes instead of
double-applying. Omit for live online movements.

created_at.description:
When the movement actually happened. Omit for live (online) movements —
the server stamps `now()`. The POS sends this for movements made OFFLINE
so they keep their real time after syncing. Future values are rejected.

Classification.description:
Wire shape: `{"mode":"cm","quadrant":"star"}` / `{"mode":"revenue","class":"hero"}`
/ `{"mode":"insufficient"}`. By construction `Cm` only ever describes
cost-tracked items and `Revenue` only cost-missing ones.

consumed_value.description: Consumption valued in piastres; `null` if any contributing cost unknown.

geo_radius_meters.description: Geofence radius in meters. Defaults to 200.

printer_port.description: TCP port for the receipt printer. Defaults to `9100` if absent.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name. If absent, the branch inherits the org's timezone.

pack_unit.description: Optional named purchase pack and its base-unit size.

discount_id.description: Optional discount the waiter applied at order time (overridable at settle).

idempotency_key.description: Client-minted dedup key for the ticket (exactly-once across LAN + cloud).

items.description: Client-priced items (same shape as a POS order line) — recorded verbatim.

round_idempotency_key.description: Per-round dedup key for the first round.

order_number.description:
Client-minted human order number (the device's per-day sequence). Stored
VERBATIM when present — the device is authoritative so its OFFLINE receipt
at ring-up is byte-identical to the synced reprint. Absent → the server
computes a per-shift number.

order_ref.description:
Client-minted order reference (`<BRANCH>-<YYMMDD>-<DEVICE>-<NNNN>`). Stored
verbatim when present; absent → the server mints the deterministic
shift-based ref. The global `UNIQUE(order_ref)` index keeps both paths
collision-safe (a managed per-device code makes concurrent tills unique).

logo.description:
Logo image file. PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Optional — omit the field
entirely to create the org without a logo.

category.description:
Cycle-count scope: snapshot only ingredients in this catalog category.
Omit (with org_ingredient_ids) for a full-branch count.

org_ingredient_ids.description: Cycle-count scope: snapshot only these specific ingredients.

branch_ids.description:
Branches to assign the new user to immediately. Branch managers
can only assign to branches they themselves are assigned to.

email.description: Required for admins and managers; ignored for tellers.

password.description:
Required when `role` is anything other than `teller`. Plain text;
hashed server-side with bcrypt before storage.

reason.description:
expired | spoiled | damaged | overproduction | order_cancelled | theft | other
(`order_cancelled` is normally auto-logged by void/cancel, not entered here)

DeliveryAddonOption.description:
One option in the org-wide addon catalog. The catalog is global (the POS
model): every item can use any addon; swap-vs-additive is decided server-side
from the addon `type` + the item recipe at order time. `price` is the
channel-effective surcharge in piastres (branch_channel → branch → catalog
default). Channel-unavailable options are excluded from the catalog entirely.

DeliveryChannelSales.description:
Delivery sales for one delivery channel (`in_mall` / `outside`). Revenue and
order counts are over **delivered** orders only; `cancelled_orders` is shown
separately so the UI can surface drop-off without inflating revenue.

revenue.description: Sum of `total` (piastres) over delivered orders on this channel.

addons.description:
Org-wide addon catalog (global, POS model): channel-effective, grouped by
`type`, applicable to every item. Channel-unavailable options are excluded.

oneOf.description:
The active discount for this channel (customer-facing) or `null`. Applies
to the item subtotal only — the delivery fee is always charged in full.

DeliveryMenuDiscount.description:
Customer-facing summary of a channel's active discount, so the public UI can
tell the customer "you've got X off" and show a discounted estimate.

allowed_addon_ids.description:
Explicit per-item addon allowlist (IDs from `menu_item_allowed_addons`).
When non-empty the customizer filters the global catalog to these IDs by
default, with a "show all" escape hatch. Empty = no restriction.

default_milk_addon_id.description:
The item's base/default milk: the `milk_type` addon whose ingredient
matches the item recipe's milk ingredient. The online customizer
pre-selects it (mirrors the POS default-milk selection). `None` when the
item has no milk in its recipe or no matching milk addon exists.

DeliveryOptionalField.description:
A per-item optional toggle (e.g. "Extra hot", "No sugar"). `price` is the
piastres surcharge; `size_label` is set when the optional only applies to a
specific size.

cart.description: The frozen priced line snapshot the POS renders before finalize.

discount_id.description:
Frozen channel discount on the item subtotal (`total == subtotal -
discount_amount + delivery_fee`). `discount_amount` is 0 when none.

extra_prep_minutes.description: Extra prep minutes the teller added on top of the branch base (multiples of 5).

device_token.description: Device-trust token from OTP verify (proves the phone).

payment_method_hint.description: "cash" | "card" — a hint the teller can change at finalize.

DeliverySalesReport.description:
Delivery sales rolled up across channels, plus a per-channel breakdown.
Always returns both `in_mall` and `outside` channels (zero-filled) so the
dashboard renders a stable shape.

DeliveryTracking.description:
Customer-safe tracking view of a delivery order, keyed by its opaque UUID
(same capability-URL trust model as the device-token flow). No phone number
is exposed; the destination fields are the customer's own inputs. Powers the
public `/track/{id}` page (polled, since the public surface has no SSE).

estimated_prep_minutes.description: Branch base prep time + the teller's per-order addition (minutes).

ErrorBody.description:
Wire shape of every error JSON. Keep in lockstep with
`AppError::error_response` below.

code.description:
Stable, machine-readable code for the error classes a client must branch
on programmatically (e.g. `ORG_SUSPENDED`). Omitted for the generic
cases where the status code alone is enough.

payment_method.description: The actual method the customer paid (overrides the hint). Must be an org method.

is_return.description: true ⟹ a return to supplier (negative stock effect).

quantity.description: Base stock units received (+) or returned (−).

variance_reason.description:
Why the count differs from expected. One of: theft | spoilage | breakage |
miscount | supplier_short | transfer_error | other. Required at finalize for
rows whose difference exceeds the org's variance threshold.

ItemKey.description:
One sellable SKU: a (menu_item_id, size_label) pair.
`size_label = "one_size"` for items without sizes.

KitchenLine.description:
A slim kitchen display line (NO prices) — what the cook reads. Built from an
order item or a ticket round line by the caller.

KitchenTicketView.description: One fire event projected for the kitchen (a round or a counter order).

LoginRequest.description:
Login is dual-mode:

- **Email + password** (admins, managers, super-admins): supply
  `email` and `password`. `org_id` is optional — if provided, the
  user must belong to that org; if omitted, lookup is by email only.
- **PIN + name** (tellers): supply `name`, `pin`, and **`branch_id`**
  (required). The teller must be assigned to that branch. `org_id` is
  derived server-side from the branch — never trusted from the client.

branch_id.description: Required for PIN login. The org is derived from this branch server-side.

name.description: Teller's display name (required for PIN login, unused otherwise).

tax_rate.description:
Org tax rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.14 = 14% VAT); 0.0 when no org. Mirrors
/auth/me so the POS has it immediately after login.

token.description: JWT to send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on subsequent requests.

deficit.description: reorder_threshold − current_stock: how much to order to reach par.

supplier_id.description: Default supplier for this ingredient (for one-click "create PO"); may be null.

tax_rate.description:
Org tax rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.14 = 14% VAT); 0.0 when the user has no
org. Exposed so the POS can compute a tax-inclusive cart total client-side.

cost_basis.description: Cost basis the report was computed with: "snapshot" | "current".

excluded_sales.description:
Realized revenue (piastres) carried by the excluded SKUs — explains
why `total_sales` differs between cost bases: each basis excludes a
different set of un-costable rows.

rows_cost_missing.description:
SKUs sold in the window but EXCLUDED from this report because their
cost was unresolvable under the chosen basis.

cost_missing_lines.description:
Lines in the window whose sale-time cost could not be resolved.
Always reports snapshot data quality, regardless of `cost_basis` —
under `current`, an included row can still carry snapshot gaps.

item_profit.description: Average profit per unit, piastres (`(sales - cost) / qty`).

popularity_pct.description: Share of units among the rows in this report (cost-tracked only).

quantity_sold.description:
Units sold (standalone lines only — bundle lines are excluded so the
per-unit economics stay clean; bundle performance has its own report).

total_cost.description:
Recipe-scope COGS in piastres (additive addons excluded — they have
their own revenue and their own report). Snapshot basis:
`SUM(unit_cost × quantity)`; current basis: today's recipe rollup ×
quantity. Rows where this is unresolvable are excluded from the
report, so it is always present.

allowed_addon_ids.description: Explicit per-item addon allowlist. Empty = no restriction (use org catalog).

MenuItemWithCosts.description:
A menu item with its per-SKU recipe-cost rollup embedded, so the catalog
list needs no separate `/costing/menu-items` round trip. `sku_costs` is one
row per sellable size (or a single `one_size` row); empty when the item is
inactive or has no recipe.

lan_secret.description:
The org's stable LAN-relay secret, hex-encoded. Devices derive a per-branch
HMAC-SHA256 subkey from it to sign every LAN message (Phase E), so only
branch-provisioned devices are trusted on the shared Wi-Fi.

tellers.description:
All PIN-login credentials for the org (tellers, waiters, and kitchen
devices). Field name kept as `tellers` for wire compatibility; it carries
every offline-capable role, distinguished by `role`.

offline_pin_hash.description:
argon2id verifier of the user's PIN (derived at online login). `null`
until the user has logged in online at least once.

role.description:
PIN-login role: `teller`, `waiter`, or `kitchen`. The device uses this to
route the offline session (a waiter lands on tickets, a kitchen device on
the KDS) without re-querying the backend.

can_complete.description: True when every `required` step is done (the Finish button enabler).

completed.description:
Persisted terminal flag — the dashboard routes into the wizard
when this is false.

recipe_coverage.description:
Recipe coverage across active menu items (0..1) — drives the cost
engine; surfaced separately because it's a percentage, not a bool.

done.description: True when the underlying data exists.

key.description: Stable key the dashboard switches on — never localized.

required.description:
Steps that are encouraged but not blocking (`required = false`
never gates `can_complete`).

opening_cash_edited.description:
Ignored by the server — the carryover edit is DERIVED from the previous
shift's declared closing. Kept only for API/back-compat with clients.

till_id.description:
The till (drawer) this shift opens on. Optional for back-compat: when
omitted the server falls back to the branch's default till. Newer
device-bound clients send their configured till explicitly.

line.description: The frozen priced SnapshotLine (name, size, addons, totals).

delivery_channel.description:
Delivery channel ("in_mall" | "outside") of the linked delivery order,
surfaced on the list so clients can flag + segment delivery orders
without a per-order detail fetch. `null` for dine-in orders.

delivery_fee.description:
Delivery charge in piastres, shown separately from the item subtotal.
Always 0 for dine-in orders; for delivery orders
`total_amount == subtotal + tax_amount + delivery_fee` (minus discount).

delivery_lat.description:
Customer location of the linked delivery order, so clients can link out
to a map (e.g. Google Maps) without a per-order detail fetch. `null` for
dine-in orders or delivery orders without captured coordinates.

delivery_order_id.description:
Links a finalized delivery order back to its `delivery_orders` row
(customer, address, channel, zone). `null` for dine-in orders.

order_ref.description:
Human-readable, org-unique reference (e.g. "DT-260614-0042"). Additive
alongside the per-shift order_number. Optional only during the rollout
window before the historical backfill runs; never null afterwards.

order_type.description:
Order origin: "dine_in" (POS sale) or "delivery" (finalized delivery
order). Defaults to "dine_in" for every POS sale.

OrderDeliveryInfo.description:
Customer-facing delivery context attached to a finalized delivery order's
detail view. Sourced from the linked `delivery_orders` row (joined to its
delivery zone for the zone name). The delivery *fee* lives on [Order];
this carries the non-financial fulfilment details a teller/manager needs.

payment_method_hint.description:
Payment method the customer indicated at intake ("cash"/"card"); the
teller confirms the actual method at finalize.

road_distance_meters.description: Road distance (meters) used to price the delivery, when known.

zone_name.description: Name of the matched delivery zone ring, when an outside order matched one.

oneOf.description:
Delivery context (customer phone, address, channel, zone), populated
only on the single-order detail endpoint and only when the order
originated from a delivery order. `null`/absent for dine-in orders.

warnings.description:
Non-fatal warnings raised while placing the order — currently used to
flag ingredients that were oversold (stock driven below zero). Empty
for reads/refunds.

items.description: Frozen cart snapshot: the items at the time of the order (for display).

cost_missing.description: True when any cost component could not be resolved.

line_cost.description:
Full line COGS in piastres (recipe + addons + optionals + components).
`null` ⟺ unknown.

unit_cost.description:
Recipe-only cost per unit in piastres (incl. swaps). `null` ⟺ unknown
or bundle line.

line_cost.description:
Ingredient cost of this addon line in piastres. `null` ⟺ unknown, or
a swap addon (its cost lives in the item's recipe cost).

unit_price.description:
Charged unit price (piastres) the POS applied for this item/bundle line. When
present it is RECORDED as the line's unit_price; absent → the server's expected
(catalog + branch override) price is used. Recording what the customer was
actually charged keeps the DB equal to the printed receipt even when the POS's
synced menu/override prices are stale or it was offline at sale time.

cost.description:
Ingredient cost per parent-item unit in piastres. `null` ⟺ unknown or
no ingredient linked.

delivery_fees.description:
Total delivery charges (piastres) across completed orders in scope.
Lets the dashboard surface delivery revenue separately from item sales.

delivery_revenue.description: Gross revenue (total_amount) of completed delivery orders.

in_mall_orders.description: In-mall channel: order count / gross revenue / delivery fees.

outside_orders.description: Outside channel: order count / gross revenue / delivery fees.

tax_rate.description:
Tax rate as a decimal (e.g. `0.14` for 14% VAT).
Stored as `BigDecimal` internally; transmitted as a JSON number.

timezone.description:
IANA timezone name. The org-level default that branches inherit when
their own timezone is unset. Defaults to `Africa/Cairo`.

cost_per_unit.description:
Piastres per unit. `null` ⟺ never entered (unknown, NOT free) —
recipes using this ingredient are cost-missing everywhere.

density_g_per_ml.description: Grams per millilitre, bridging weight↔volume in recipes; `null` = none.

pack_size.description: How many BASE STOCK units one `pack_unit` yields; `null` = none.

supplier_id.description: Default supplier for reordering this ingredient; `null` = none set.

yield_pct.description:
Usable % after trim/cook loss (e.g. 70 = 70%); `null` = 100%. Recipe
quantities are grossed up by this at save time.

stocktake_variance_threshold_pct.description:
Stock-count variance tolerance (percent). A counted row whose |difference|
is at least this percent of expected is flagged and needs a reason.

units_per_purchase_unit.description:
Stock units per purchase unit. Ignored when `purchase_unit` is a known
inventory unit (the factor is derived from the ingredient's base unit).

PaginatedOrdersFull.description:
Same envelope as [PaginatedOrders] but each order carries its line items
(returned when `include_items=true`).

avg_orders_per_day.description: Orders averaged over the number of calendar days (may be fractional).

avg_revenue_per_day.description: Revenue in piastres averaged over the number of calendar days in the queried range.

orders_pct.description: This hour's orders as a percentage of the period total (0–100, 1 dp).

revenue_pct.description: This hour's revenue as a percentage of the period total (0–100, 1 dp).

median_margin_pct_peers.description: Only set when this item is CM-tracked AND peers are CM-tracked too.

PermissionMatrix.description:
One cell of the resolved permission matrix for a user.
`effective` = `user_override` if present, else `role_default`, else false.

extra_prep_minutes.description:
Minutes the teller adds on top of the branch base prep time. Must be a
non-negative multiple of 5.

PriceAnchors.description:
Two anchors are universal; the cost-plus anchor is only meaningful with
cost data, so it's optional.

PriceRoundingRule.description:
Serializes as `"EgyptianCafe"` / `"NearestUnit"` — PascalCase on the wire
(no `rename_all`); existing clients depend on it.

cost_missing.description:
True when cost data is unavailable for this item. Mirrors
`classification` mode, exposed flat for UI badge rendering.

in_mall_open_now.description: Effective-open right now (enabled + open shift + override + window).

in_mall_require_location.description: When false, in-mall ordering does not require a device GPS location.

otp_required.description: When false, the public checkout skips OTP verification for this branch.

branch_name.description:
Branch label — populated by the order lists so the "All branches" view
can show which branch each PO belongs to; other endpoints leave it null.

addon_item_ids.description:
Full replacement set of addon item IDs allowed on this menu item.
Send an empty array to clear the restriction (falls back to org catalog).

QrResponse.description: JSON returned from every QR-generation endpoint.

qr_data_url.description: `data:image/png;base64,…` (or `data:image/svg+xml;base64,…` when `svg=true`). Paste into a browser `` to verify.

unit_cost.description:
Optional ACTUAL invoice cost (piastres per purchase unit) for this
delivery, when it differs from the ordered price. Drives weighted-average
cost + the ledger; omitted ⟹ the PO line's ordered cost is used.

decision.description:
accepted | rejected | ignored — kept as a string so invalid values
yield a 400 instead of a deserialization error.

ReorderLine.description:
One ingredient to reorder, with the quantity needed to reach its order-up-to
level (par_max, else the reorder point).

suggested_qty.description: Quantity (in base units) to bring stock up to the order-up-to level.

ReorderSuggestion.description:
Reorder suggestions grouped by the ingredient's default supplier so the
dashboard can raise one draft PO per supplier.

distance_meters.description: Straight-line distance from the supplied coordinates to the branch, in metres.

quantity.description: Base stock units to return (must be ≤ on hand).

unit_cost.description: Piastres per base stock unit; defaults to the branch's actual cost.

effective.description: What actually applies right now (auto resolves to kds-if-stations-else-till).

mode.description: Stored override (`kds` | `till` | `both`), or null when auto.
`kds` | `till` | `both`, or null to clear the override (back to auto).

discount_id.description: Settle-time overrides (else the ticket's own discount / no tip).

branch_name.description:
Branch label — only populated by the shifts list (so the "All branches"
view can show which branch each shift belongs to). Other shift endpoints
leave it `null`.

till_id.description:
The till (drawer) this shift is on. Populated by the read/list/open
endpoints; mutation responses that build the row via RETURNING may leave
`till_name` null (same convention as `branch_name`).

cash_movements_net.description: Net of all cash movements (in - out) as a signed integer

expected_cash.description:
Authoritative system (expected) cash in the drawer. For a closed shift
this is the snapshot taken at close (`closing_cash_system`); for an open
shift it is computed live via the same formula. Clients should display
this directly instead of re-deriving it from the payment breakdown.

reason.description: The variance reason captured at finalize, or `unexplained` when none.

shrinkage_qty.description: Quantity lost (positive number) from negative stock-count differences.

shrinkage_value.description: Valued shrinkage in piastres; `null` when any contributing cost unknown.

SkuCost.description: Computed cost for one sellable SKU (menu item × size).

cost.description:
Recipe cost rollup in piastres over the ingredients that *are* priced.
`null` only when there is no recipe, or no recipe ingredient has a known
cost at all. A partial rollup (some ingredients unpriced) still returns
the sum so far, with `cost_missing = true` flagging it as incomplete.

cost_missing.description:
`true` when at least one recipe ingredient is unlinked or has no cost, so
`cost` (if any) is a partial figure rather than the full COGS.

food_cost_pct.description: `cost / price` — only when the cost is *complete* and price > 0.

margin_pct.description:
`(price - cost) / price` — only when the cost is *complete* and price > 0.
Suppressed (`null`) for partial rollups so an incomplete cost is never
graded as a food-cost percentage.

price.description: Current price in piastres for this SKU.

size_label.description: `"one_size"` when the item has no sizes.

status.description:
Target line step: "confirmed" | "preparing" | "ready" | "out_for_delivery".
The teller may jump to ANY of these from any non-terminal state (forward or
back); the landed step is stamped and all other step stamps are cleared, and
at most one customer WhatsApp fires (the last newly-crossed step that has one).

cost_per_unit.description: Piastres per unit; `null` ⟺ cost never entered.

branch_name.description:
Branch label — only populated by the stocktakes list (so the "All
branches" view can show which branch each stocktake belongs to). Other
stocktake endpoints leave it `null`.

variance_threshold_pct.description:
Org tolerance: a counted row whose |difference| is >= this percent of the
expected quantity (or that appears-from / vanishes-to zero) is flagged and
requires a `variance_reason` before the count can be finalized.

variance_reason.description: theft | spoilage | breakage | miscount | supplier_short | transfer_error | other.

UpdateBranchRequest.description:
PATCH-style update. Fields fall into three categories:

- **Absent** from JSON → keep existing value.
- **Present as `null`** (only the `printer_*` fields) → clear the column.
- **Present as a value** → set to that value.

OpenAPI cannot express the absent-vs-null distinction cleanly, so all
fields are documented as optional and nullable. Clients targeting this
endpoint should send only the fields they want to change.

available_from_time.description:
`null`  → clear the field (no start time restriction)
omitted → keep the existing value
a value → set to that time

supplier_id.description:
Set/replace the default supplier. (Omitted = unchanged; clearing to
none is not supported via this field.)

logo_url.description:
`null` clears the logo; absent leaves it unchanged. To set a new
logo, use `PUT /orgs/{id}/logo` (multipart) instead — JSON updates
only accept the clear-to-null case here.

timezone.description:
IANA timezone name (e.g. `Africa/Cairo`). Validated against the
PostgreSQL timezone database. Branches inherit this when their own
timezone is unset.

oneOf.description:
Only org-admins and above can change roles. Promoting to
`super_admin` requires the caller to be a super-admin.

image.description: Image file. PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Required.

logo.description: Logo image file. PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Required.

value.description: current_stock × cost_per_unit in piastres; `null` when cost unknown.

net_variance_value.description: overage − shrinkage (net effect on inventory value).

total_shrinkage_value.description: Piastres lost to shrinkage (negative variances), as a positive number.

unknown_cost_count.description: Count of counted rows whose cost was unknown (excluded from totals).

is_flagged.description: True when |difference| exceeds the org threshold (or appears/vanishes from zero).

variance_reason.description: theft | spoilage | breakage | miscount | supplier_short | transfer_error | other.

variance_value.description: variance × unit_cost in piastres; `null` when cost unknown.

WhatsappStatus.description:
Snapshot returned to the dashboard. Combines the gateway's live link state
with the backend's persisted pause switch.

connected.description: Underlying socket is connected to WhatsApp.

has_qr.description: A pairing QR is currently available to scan.

logged_in.description: A number is linked and ready to send.

paused.description:
Sending is paused by an admin — the number stays linked but every
outbound message (OTP + status) is suppressed until resumed.

qr_image.description: Current pairing QR as a `data:image/png;base64,…` URL (only when `has_qr`).

reachable.description: The gateway answered over HTTP (false = not configured or unreachable).

session.description: Session name the relay pairs/sends under.

bearer_jwt.description: JWT obtained from `POST /auth/login` (email/password) or `POST /auth/pin-login` (teller PIN). Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
